acceptance_criteria.text: The incomplete prototype is rejected without terminal mutation traces.
The complete fixture passes through a reviewable Evidence and provenance chain.
Every loaded and distributed Project Loop Skill copy is parser-valid and byte-identical.
Strict validation, full regression, package contracts, and clean-wheel smoke pass.

assumptions.text: External skills declare every report required by their own domain contract.
Conversation source references are factual caller claims rather than authenticated identities.

constraints.text: Prototype and complete outcomes must remain distinct.
No release preparation begins before independent human review.

intent.desired_outcome: A human can approve or reject the v0.4.3 dogfood gate from a concise, hash-bound review packet.
intent.problem: Automated success alone must not self-approve the final cross-skill release gate.

non_goals: Do not publish, tag, push, or prepare final release artifacts in this review step.
Do not claim identity authentication or external report completeness beyond the declared manifest.
